name: growisto-schema-audit
description: Audit + generate schema.org markup for any URL. Crawls each page, detects existing JSON-LD/microdata/RDFa, classifies page type (product/article/pricing/etc.), checks against per-page-type expectations (sourced from a tunable YAML rulebook), and produces an Excel report listing schemas present, schemas missing or incomplete (with HIGH/MED/LOW priority), and paste-ready JSON-LD code templates for every gap. 26 schema types supported including Product, Article, FAQPage, Organization, BreadcrumbList, LocalBusiness, HowTo, Recipe, Event, SoftwareApplication. No LLM API calls — pure deterministic Python + Jinja2 templates. Optional Playwright support for JS-rendered sites (install separately).
